title: bromus molliformis subsp. humilis
intro: Bromus molliformis subsp. humilis, also known as a type of wild grass or false brome, is a subspecies of the plant Bromus molliformis. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting digestion, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
